prompt.task: Update GitHub Projects during sprint execution and track progress

step.title: Start Implementation
Create Pull Request
step.description: - Create PR: gh pr create --title "{STORY_TITLE}" --body "Closes #{STORY_NUMBER}" - PR will auto-move story to "Review" column - Update Implementation Phase: Testing

step.title: Complete Story
step.description: - Merge PR (auto-moves to "Done") - Update AI Context Status: Fresh - Add completion notes to story - Update Epic progress
